title: [Dungeon, Treasure Room]
description: Large iron-bound chests filled to the brim with coins are stacked in a haphazard manner around the room.  Some of the glorious bounty of coins spills out across the floor messily, like a shimmering carpet of discarded wealth before a trapezoidal door.  Precious gems wink and shimmer from amid the gold.  All kinds of fine trinkets and finery lay spread out or in careless piles, hoarded, but uncared for.
